spell.name: Song of Marching
spell.text: You maintain a brisk performance that keeps allies on the move. You and your allies in the area can Hustle for the spell's duration, in addition to your other exploration activities (your exploration activity is Sustaining this spell). You and your allies then become temporarily immune for 1 day. If you enter an encounter while performing this song, you can use your Performance modifier for the initiative roll. You and your affected allies also receive a +1 status bonus to that initiative roll.

heightened.text: You can Sustain the Spell for up to 2 hours.
You can Sustain the Spell for up to 4 hours.
